creator: wolman@cs.washington.edu
text:
The following patch upgrades the gnu make port from version
3.77 to version 3.78.1.  Note that two of the files,
patches/patch-aa  and  patches/patch-ab  are no longer needed.
You can download the patch from
http://www.cs.washington.edu/homes/wolman/patches/gmake.patch

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: n/a
